calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn For Order Striking Claim
Off Calendar Nov-21-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Pamela A. Underwood, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: People of The State of California

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of The State of California's motion for an order striking claim is granted. No opposition has been filed. Order signed in open court. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Demand For Production And Inspection Of Documents; Petitioner'S First Of Special Interrogatories; Judicial Council Form Interrogatories
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Petitioner People of the State of California's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Respondent is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
